message:
a11y(button): respect prefers-reduced-motion setting

Added support for the user's system-level reduced motion preference.
The button now automatically disables spring animations when either:
- The disableMotion prop is explicitly set, or
- The user has prefers-reduced-motion enabled in their OS

This improves accessibility for users who experience motion sensitivity
or vestibular disorders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
